name: Vampire school life
description:
The life of going to school with many elite vampires.

Vampires have a stranglehold on the society of man, with many powerful vampire lords shamelessly showing themselves off to the world, not even hiding the influence they have on politics or the economy.

You go to a school that many young vampires flock to, due to the principal being quite submissive to whatever demands the vampires make. Even the heiress to the grand vampire lord is present, and in your class…

Characters:

Sara: Erratic, wild, power-hungry

Elizabeth Zar: Calm elegance, influential gal

Yusuf: Chill nerd, studious, has secret history with Elizabeth
creator: Olpash
